case_title: HEATH, DANIEL P DBA L.O. HEATH PLUMBING COMPANY VS LEONARD SALOMON, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HEATH, DANIEL P DBA L.O. HEATH PLUMBING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LEONARD SALOMON, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEATH, DANIEL P DBA L.O. HEATH PLUMBING COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEONARD SALOMON, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
